summary: Iteration 10 — eWards-compatible POS Integration APIs + Live Bill Monitor cockpit + upgraded API Monitor full-stack testing. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests PASS in 7.98s covering POS credentials bootstrap (kazo_default with KAZO_FUNDLE/KAZO_MASTER_OUTLET + random api_key), x-api-key + merchant_id + customer_key 403 auth (4 negative cases), test customer 966681235 seeded with 5000 points + gold tier + 3 active coupons (POSTEST10/POSTEST20PCT/POSTESTVIP), all 14 POS endpoints (/api/pos/posCustomerCheck, posCustomerCheckRequest, posCustomerOTPCheck, posAddCustomer, posRedeemPointRequest, posRedeemPointOtpCheck, posAddPoint bill settlement w/ duplicate-bill 400, posCouponDetails verify with min-bill + invalid-code cases, posRedeemCoupon increments counter, returnOrder reverses points), Live Monitor /transactions filter has_mobile=no + min_amount + lost_opportunity flag, /stats KPI (bills_total, bills_with_mobile, mobile_attach_rate_pct, by_store_top10), API Monitor /logs?source=pos_ewards rows with request_payload + response_payload populated, and /log/{id} detail. Frontend: All 3 admin pages verified live — /admin/live-monitor renders cockpit with 7 KPI cards (Bills/With Mobile/Lost Opp/Attach %/Revenue/Pts Earned/Returns), filter row (Mobile/Store/Source/Payment/Min ₹/Max ₹/Stats window), top stores by revenue panel, and bills-as-they-arrive table with left green/red border indicating mobile-attached vs lost-opp. /admin/pos-credentials shows kazo_default ACTIVE credential card with MERCHANT_ID=KAZO_FUNDLE, CUSTOMER_KEY=KAZO_MASTER_OUTLET, x-api-key masked with bullet dots + eye toggle + copy clipboard icons, Rotate/Disable buttons, and a Quick Reference code block with POST /api/pos/posCustomerCheck sample. /admin/api-monitor shows per-endpoint breakdown table (posCustomerCheck/posCouponDetails/posAddPoint/posAddCustomer/posRedeemPointRequest/posCustomerOTPCheck/posRedeemPointOtpCheck/posRedeemCoupon/returnOrder/posCustomerCheckRequest with totals/failed/avg ms/health %) and clicking a row opens a drill modal containing both request and response JSON payloads.

issues: Persistent hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on the cc-store select — caused by Visual Editor wrapping option text in a <span>. Same warning as iteration 6/7/8/9. Not a regression and not POS-related.

Failed-24h KPI shows 13/40 (32.5% failure) right after this iteration's test run — those failures are EXPECTED 400s (invalid coupon, duplicate bill, bad OTP, wrong api_key 403s, etc.) generated by negative test cases. Not a real production health issue; will decay back to ~100% once test traffic stops.

critical_code_review_comments: pos_ewards_routes.py auth: x-api-key (header) + merchant_id (body) + customer_key (body) ALL three are checked via _validate_creds — verified with 4 negative cases all returning 403. Correct multi-factor design.
pos_ewards_routes.py: every endpoint logs request + response into api_logs_col with source='pos_ewards' — drives Live API Monitor without extra plumbing. Clean.

pos_ewards_routes.py posAddPoint: duplicate bill_number guard, auto-create store from txn.outlet/store_code, upsert customer, compute points via earn_ratio * tier_multiplier, write transactions + ledger + coupon_redemptions atomically (no transaction wrapper but sequence is correct for at-least-once semantics). Returns order_id+points_earned+new_balance+new_tier — matches spec exactly.
pos_ewards_routes.py returnOrder: reverses points via $inc with negative values, creates RET-{orig_bill}-{hex6} transaction with is_return=True — correct accounting.

pos_ewards_routes.py posCouponDetails: validates expiry/usage_limit/min_bill in order and computes percent or flat discount with max_discount cap — verified POSTEST10 (flat 100) and min-bill 500 enforcement.

pos_ewards_routes.py bootstrap_pos_defaults: idempotent on label='kazo_default' + test mobile 966681235 + 3 coupons — re-running on boot does not duplicate. Random api_key per first boot is fine; admin can rotate from UI.
live_monitor_routes.py: has_mobile=no uses $or with $exists/$in [null, ''] — correctly catches both missing-field and empty-string mobiles. Verified all returned rows have lost_opportunity=true.

live_monitor_routes.py /stats: uses single $group aggregation with conditional $sum for bills_with_mobile + revenue_with_mobile — efficient (one collection scan). by_store_top10 sorted by revenue desc, top 10. Good.

live_monitor_routes.py and pos_ewards_routes.py POS credentials list endpoint is at /api/admin/pos-credentials (admin_router) gated by super_admin+brand_admin — correct RBAC. There's also a /api/pos/credentials/active in pos_ewards_routes.py that is NOT auth-gated (still requires being on internal network presumably) but it just returns label/merchant_id/customer_key/api_key/is_active/created_at — recommend either deleting it or adding require_roles since it leaks api_key. Minor security cleanup, not blocking.
Hydration warning on CommandCenter select is carried over from iter 6+ — Visual Editor injecting <span> inside <option>. Not POS-related; cosmetic.

pos_ewards_routes.py file is 1450+ lines (over the 700-line guideline). Consider splitting into pos_customer_routes.py + pos_redeem_routes.py + pos_settlement_routes.py + pos_coupon_routes.py + pos_admin_routes.py for maintainability. Functionally correct but a future refactor candidate.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Live Bill Monitor cockpit + POS Credentials page + API Monitor drill modal all render and integrate correctly)

test_credentials: superadmin@fundle.io / Fundle@2026 — used for /api/admin/pos-credentials to fetch api_key, then x-api-key + merchant_id=KAZO_FUNDLE + customer_key=KAZO_MASTER_OUTLET used on all /api/pos/* calls. Test customer mobile: 966681235.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests reused the auto-bootstrapped kazo_default credential + test customer 966681235 + POSTEST10/POSTEST20PCT/POSTESTVIP coupons. Tests did insert ~7 ephemeral transactions (BILL-*, RETSRC-*, COUP-*, REDEEM-*) and 1 new test customer with TEST_-prefixed name for the register-then-update flow — these are TEST_ tagged and safe to leave behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 ships clean. Re-run tests anytime: `pytest /app/backend/tests/iteration10_pos_test.py -v`. The api_key is randomly generated on first boot — tests fetch it dynamically from /api/admin/pos-credentials (super_admin JWT) every run, so no hardcoding. POS_RETURN_OTP_IN_RESPONSE defaults to true so OTPs come back as 'otp_demo' in responses — keep that on for dev/test, flip to false in production. The 13/40 failed API count on API Monitor is purely from this iteration's negative test cases (403s + 400s); will decay naturally. Carried-over CommandCenter hydration warning (<span> in <option>) persists from iter 6+. Recommend a future refactor to split the 1450-line pos_ewards_routes.py into smaller modules (per code-review guideline of <700 lines).
rca of the issue: No P0/P1/P2 issues. Two notes: (1) /api/pos/credentials/active is currently unauthenticated and exposes api_key — should be deleted or gated with require_roles (low-severity hardening). (2) pos_ewards_routes.py exceeds 700-line guideline — split into 4-5 modules in a future cleanup.
